name: UBA : Browsed to Malicious Website
notes:
A user has accessed a URL which may indicate elevated security or legal risk.

References: 
    http://sitereview.bluecoat.com/categories.jsp
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : URL Category Filter

when the event matches "Web Category" ilike '%malicious%' or "Web Category" ilike '%anonymiz%' or "Web Category" ilike '%parked%' or "Web Category" ilike '%spam%' or "Web Category" ilike '%exploit%' or "Web Category" ilike '%PUP%' or "Web Category" ilike '%spyware%' or "Web Category" ilike '%malware%' or "Web Category" ilike '%avoidance%' or "Web Category" ilike '%unwanted software%' or "Web Category" ilike '%suspicious%' or "Web Category" ilike '%non-viewable%' or "Web Category" ilike '%residential%' OR "Web Category" in (75, 126, 127, 154, 166, 167, 172, 192, 193, 194, 200, 202, 205, 206, 207, 213, 214, 216, 217, 218, 219, 220) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Browsed to Malicious Website on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
